news.title:
RITES Ltd announces resignation of Company Secretary Ashok Mishra, effective March 19, 2026.
Nikhil Agarwal appointed as interim Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective March 19, 2026.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd announces resignation of Company Secretary Ashok Mishra, effective March 19, 2026.
Nikhil Agarwal appointed as interim Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective March 19, 2026.

news.title:
Tata Power partners with Salesforce for clean energy transformation; UltraTech acquires 26.2% Sunsure Solarpark stake for green energy goals.
Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.
news.summary:
Tata Power partners with Salesforce for clean energy transformation; UltraTech acquires 26.2% Sunsure Solarpark stake for green energy goals.
Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.

news.title:
RITES Ltd secures Rs. 45.2 crore order from West Bengal's Public Works Roads Directorate for bridge consultancy.
Project involves 4-lane bridge over river Muriganga, connecting Kachuberia, Sagar Island, and Kakdwip; completion in 48 months.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd secures Rs. 45.2 crore order from West Bengal's Public Works Roads Directorate for bridge consultancy.
Project involves 4-lane bridge over river Muriganga, connecting Kachuberia, Sagar Island, and Kakdwip; completion in 48 months.

news.title:
RITES revises railway electrification project cost to ₹7.29B.
Project covers Mysuru-Hassan-Mangaluru sector, enhancing infrastructure.
news.summary:
RITES revises railway electrification project cost to ₹7.29B.
Project covers Mysuru-Hassan-Mangaluru sector, enhancing infrastructure.

news.title:
RITES Ltd appoints Shri Vinod Kumar Sharma as Chief Vigilance Officer effective Feb 09, 2026.
Sharma has 25+ years in telecom, previously Business Area Head at BSNL Muzaffarpur.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd appoints Shri Vinod Kumar Sharma as Chief Vigilance Officer effective Feb 09, 2026.
Sharma has 25+ years in telecom, previously Business Area Head at BSNL Muzaffarpur.

news.title:
RITES Ltd aims for a Rs 10,000 crore order book by FY27.
The company targets a 60% execution momentum to achieve this goal.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd aims for a Rs 10,000 crore order book by FY27.
The company targets a 60% execution momentum to achieve this goal.

news.title:
RITES Q3 earnings highlight significant order book growth and margins.
The company outlines a disruptive growth plan targeting FY27.
news.summary:
RITES Q3 earnings highlight significant order book growth and margins.
The company outlines a disruptive growth plan targeting FY27.

news.title: RITES reported Q3 revenue of 6B rupees, up from 5.76B YoY.
news.summary: RITES reported Q3 revenue of 6B rupees, up from 5.76B YoY.

news.title:
RITES and SAIL sign MoU for loco leasing and maintenance services.
The partnership aims to improve SAIL's railway efficiency, formalizing 20 years of support.
news.summary:
RITES and SAIL sign MoU for loco leasing and maintenance services.
The partnership aims to improve SAIL's railway efficiency, formalizing 20 years of support.

news.title:
RITES Ltd announces Q3FY26 results conference call on Feb 5, 2026.
Key management, including CMD Rahul Mithal, will discuss financials.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd announces Q3FY26 results conference call on Feb 5, 2026.
Key management, including CMD Rahul Mithal, will discuss financials.

news.title:
Railway stocks like IRFC, RVNL, RITES drop up to 5% post Budget 2026 announcements.
Railway capex increased by 10% to ₹2.93L crore; key projects see marginal allocation hikes.
news.summary:
Railway stocks like IRFC, RVNL, RITES drop up to 5% post Budget 2026 announcements.
Railway capex increased by 10% to ₹2.93L crore; key projects see marginal allocation hikes.

news.title:
Rail stocks rose as FM Sitharaman announced seven high-speed rail corridors, boosting connectivity and economic activity.
Top gainers included Quadrant Future Tek (+3%), Jupiter Wagons (+1.9%), IRFC (+1.2%), and RITES (+1.2%).
news.summary:
Rail stocks rose as FM Sitharaman announced seven high-speed rail corridors, boosting connectivity and economic activity.
Top gainers included Quadrant Future Tek (+3%), Jupiter Wagons (+1.9%), IRFC (+1.2%), and RITES (+1.2%).

news.title:
Railway stocks likely to gain from 15% rise in FY26 railway capex, focusing on execution, safety upgrades, and capacity expansion.
RITES, Titagarh Rail Systems, CG Power, HBL Power, and Kernex Microsystems seen as beneficiaries of modernization and infrastructure thrust.
news.summary:
Railway stocks likely to gain from 15% rise in FY26 railway capex, focusing on execution, safety upgrades, and capacity expansion.
RITES, Titagarh Rail Systems, CG Power, HBL Power, and Kernex Microsystems seen as beneficiaries of modernization and infrastructure thrust.

news.title:
Indian Railways plans 7,900 km track renewal by FY27, boosting safety and efficiency. Stocks like GPT Infraprojects, RVNL, RITES Ltd may benefit.
GPT Infraprojects, RVNL, GR Infraprojects, and RITES report strong order books; revenue growth varies with mixed profitability trends.
news.summary:
Indian Railways plans 7,900 km track renewal by FY27, boosting safety and efficiency. Stocks like GPT Infraprojects, RVNL, RITES Ltd may benefit.
GPT Infraprojects, RVNL, GR Infraprojects, and RITES report strong order books; revenue growth varies with mixed profitability trends.

news.title:
RITES wins a $20.6M (Rs 180 Cr) contract from ICVL Mozambique for diesel-electric locomotives.
The project includes 15 months for supply and 24 months for maintenance services.
news.summary:
RITES wins a $20.6M (Rs 180 Cr) contract from ICVL Mozambique for diesel-electric locomotives.
The project includes 15 months for supply and 24 months for maintenance services.

news.title:
RITES Ltd's board to meet on February 4, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
The board will also consider declaring a third interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd's board to meet on February 4, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
The board will also consider declaring a third interim dividend for FY 2025-26.

news.title:
Nifty opens at 26,000 and Sensex rises by 200 points.
RITES and Bharat Forge are highlighted in market focus.
news.summary:
Nifty opens at 26,000 and Sensex rises by 200 points.
RITES and Bharat Forge are highlighted in market focus.

news.title: RITES wins an international contract worth $35.2M from Ndalama Capital, South Africa.
news.summary: RITES wins an international contract worth $35.2M from Ndalama Capital, South Africa.

news.title:
RITES Ltd secures a $35.2M international order from Ndalama Capital, South Africa.
The 18-month contract involves supply and commissioning of Cape Gauge ALCO diesel-electric locomotives.
news.summary:
RITES Ltd secures a $35.2M international order from Ndalama Capital, South Africa.
The 18-month contract involves supply and commissioning of Cape Gauge ALCO diesel-electric locomotives.

news.title:
Tata Steel infused ₹1,354.9 cr into T Steel Holdings; RITES signed an MoU with Botswana for railway modernization.
Tata Chemicals to acquire Novabay Pte; Granules India completed US FDA inspection with 5 observations; Adani explores nuclear power.
news.summary:
Tata Steel infused ₹1,354.9 cr into T Steel Holdings; RITES signed an MoU with Botswana for railway modernization.
Tata Chemicals to acquire Novabay Pte; Granules India completed US FDA inspection with 5 observations; Adani explores nuclear power.
